channel.title: Outdoor Recreation Events
channel.description: Upcoming events for Outdoor Recreation Events

item.title: Zumba by Tiny Fitness
item.description:
Sunday, June 28, 2026 at 9 AM

Join the party and sweat with Tiny Fitness to rhythms from around the world! This hour-long Zumba fitness class will have you grooving, shaking, and toning to salsa, hip hop, samba, and bhangra beats – and so many more. Open to all fitness levels and recommended for ages 16+, no equipment needed. Always move to your own beat and consult your health team before beginning or modifying your exercise program. To learn more about the Tiny Fitness studio visit their website.

From Levy Park Houston

Event details

item.title: Free Watch Party: South Africa vs. Canada
item.description:
Sunday, June 28, 2026 at 12:30 PM

The group stage is done and the knockout rounds are here! Thirty-two teams still standing, all of them hungry, none of them ready to go home. Tonight the tournament gets real. Join us as the first teams punch their tickets to the Round of 16. Festival gates open at 12:30 p.m. to the music of DJ Cris. Kickoff is at 2:00 p.m. Admission is free! Food and Beverage Concessions: Enjoy a variety of festival food fare, beer and wine, and non-alcoholic beverages from Coca-Cola. Visit Smalls Sliders for burgers, fries, and shakes and cool down with Frios Gourmet Pops. Stop by Hearsay’s festival tent for a cold beer or beer bucket or grab a michelada, wine, or beer from Gaspacho’s festival tent. Non-alcoholic drinks from Coca-Cola as well as pre-packaged snacks can be purchased at the Community Partner Concessions Booth, proceeds benefiting Levy Park and the event’s community partners. Community Partner: We are proud to be joined by our Community Partner, Dynamo & Dash Charities, for this event! By leveraging the passion of players, staff, and fans, Dynamo & Dash Charities provides resources and education to positively impact lives in the community. Stop by the Community Partner Booth to support their amazing work and learn more about their initiatives. All food & beverage proceeds from the Community Partner booth will support Dynamo & Dash Charities and Levy Park. Face Painting & Henna Art: Get into the tournament spirit with face and body art from Butterfly Faces by Shondra Macklin and Henna Station & Glitter Bar Merchandise: Event merchandise celebrating Houston, Levy Park, and the global soccer tournament will also be available for purchase. Art Installations and Photo Opportunities: Commemorate the experience with a photo tour of the park, including life-sized soccer-themed photo backdrops and a tournament bracket. Visit our soccer ball music box and turn the crank for festive sounds. Festival Guidelines: VISITORS MUST COMPLY WITH DIRECTIONS FROM PARK PERSONNEL, OR THEY WILL BE ASKED TO LEAVE THE PARK. PARENTS ARE RESPONSIBLE FOR THEIR CHILDREN’S SAFETY IN THE PARK. CHAIRS AND SEATING: No outside furniture. Blankets may be brought into the Festival site for the designated blanket seating area. All other furniture is available on a first-come, first-served basis. STROLLERS & WAGONS: Oversized strollers and wagons may need to be parked in a designated area during the festival. All visitors must comply with park personnel regarding stroller and wagon parking. FOOD AND BEVERAGES: Guests are permitted to enter with one factory-sealed bottle of water. Outside food and drinks are prohibited (exceptions will be made for baby food and necessary medical dietary food items). A variety of food, non-alcoholic drinks, beer, and wine will be available for purchase from Festival concessionaires. RE-ENTRY: If you leave the Festival site, you will be re-screened before re-entry. THE FOLLOWING ARE PROHIBITED: Smoking or Vaping Umbrellas Drug Use Kites and Drones Recreational Motorized Vehicles Guns, knives, any weaponry Soliciting Bikes, scooters, rollerblades, and roller skates

From Levy Park Houston

Event details

item.title: Zumba by Tiny Fitness
item.description:
Monday, June 29, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: Levy Park (Event Pavilion), TX

Join the party and sweat with Tiny Fitness to rhythms from around the world! This hour-long Zumba fitness class will have you grooving, shaking, and toning to salsa, hip hop, samba, and bhangra beats – and so many more. Open to all fitness levels and recommended for ages 16+, no equipment needed. Always move to your own beat and consult your health team before beginning or modifying your exercise program. To learn more about the Tiny Fitness studio visit website.

From Levy Park Houston

Event details

item.title: Full Moon Hike
item.description:
Monday, June 29, 2026 at 7:50 PM

[hiking] Join us for a Full Moon Hike — a free outdoor adventure designed to help you get outside, breathe a little deeper, and meet people who love exploring as much as you do

From HTXoutdoors

Event details

item.title: Family Storytime & Craft
item.description:
Tuesday, June 30, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Levy Park (Event Pavilion), TX

Join us for a cross-generational literacy experience! Family Storytime features a story followed by a craft that accompanies the reading. All craft supplies are included as a part of this free program.

From Levy Park Houston

Event details

item.title: Dance Discovery Series: Cumbia
item.description:
Wednesday, July 1, 2026 at 6:15 PM

[training] Join us for the Dance Discovery Series, a fun and welcoming journey through a variety of dances styles from around the world

From HTXoutdoors

Event details

item.title: Axe and Knife Throwing
item.description:
Sunday, July 5, 2026 at 3:20 PM

[social] Let's try for some bullseyes! It’s like darts but with axes and knives!

From HTXoutdoors

Event details

item.title: New Member Party & Social
item.description:
Wednesday, July 8, 2026 at 6 PM

[social] You’ve joined the coolest crew in Houston—and now it’s time to celebrate! You’re officially part of a vibrant community of outdoor-loving, fun-seeking, down-for-anything adventurers. Whether you're brand new to the club or just haven't made it to an event yet, this party is the perfect way to kick off your journey.

From HTXoutdoors

Event details

item.title: Evening Forest Hike
item.description:
Wednesday, July 8, 2026 at 7 PM

[hiking] Whether you’re looking to relax, enjoy nature, or meet others in the community, this hike offers the perfect midweek reset.

From HTXoutdoors

Event details

item.title: Elevation Training in Buffalo Bayou
item.description:
Thursday, July 9, 2026 at 7:30 PM

[training] Join me for a unique training/workout in the Downton Houston area.

From HTXoutdoors

Event details

item.title: Ice Skating Sugar Land
item.description:
Friday, July 10, 2026 at 7:30 PM

[skating] Let's hit the ice.

From HTXoutdoors

Event details

item.title: Disc Golf at TC Jester Park
item.description:
Saturday, July 11, 2026 at 8 AM

[social] Doesn't matter if you are a beginner or a pro at disc golf. This is a fun round on all the holes. Just make sure you have some discs to join and play.

From HTXoutdoors

Event details

item.title: Intro to Kayak Roll Pool Party
item.description:
Monday, July 13, 2026 at 6 PM

[water-sport] Want to work on your roll between White Water Kayaking sessions? Event Leader Rob has a great property with an outdoor pool. Practice your roll in the pool and socialize with other paddlers.

From HTXoutdoors

Event details

item.title: Chile Multisport Adventure Info Meeting
item.description:
Thursday, July 16, 2026 at 7 PM

[public] Public - Discover how you can immerse yourself in Pucon’s best multi-sport activities and enjoy a unique retreat experience that balances thrilling adventures with moments of pure relaxation. Find out why this trip is the ultimate way to explore Chile’s adventure capital and how you can be part of this unforgettable journey.

From HTXoutdoors

Event details

item.title: Lunar Landing 5k
item.description:
Saturday, July 18, 2026 at 6:30 AM

[running] The Lunar Landing 5K is a great way to celebrate one of mankind’s greatest accomplishments.

From HTXoutdoors

Event details

item.title: SUP & Kayak Social
item.description:
Saturday, July 18, 2026 at 8 AM

[water-sport] Cool off with a little SUP action! We'll bring Stand Up Paddleboards to share. If you’ve never SUP’ed before, we’ll show you the basics strokes and how to stand on the board. Plus the proper way to hold the paddle!

From HTXoutdoors

Event details

item.title: Climbing at Momentum Katy
item.description:
Tuesday, July 21, 2026 at 7:30 PM

[climbing] Join us for some top rope climbing at Momentum Indoor Climbing. You don’t need any experience to join, all levels are welcome.

From HTXoutdoors

Event details

item.title: Mountain Biking
item.description:
Saturday, August 1, 2026 at 10 AM

[cycling] Ready to trade pavement for shady singletrack? Join us for a fun mountain bike ride at Jack Brooks Park, one of the southeast Houston area’s real-deal mountain bike trail systems.

From HTXoutdoors

item.title: African Safari Adventure
item.description:
Thursday, September 3, 2026 at 8 AM

[social] Immerse yourself in the wilds of Africa!! Botswana is one of the few remaining destinations in Africa that still provides a good sense of adventure while on safari.

From HTXoutdoors

item.title: Glacier Backpacking Trip
item.description:
Saturday, September 12, 2026 at 12 PM

[camping] Ready for a scenic backpacking route in Glacier National Park? This is a point-to-point traverse over Gunsight Pass… alpine views, waterfalls, turquoise lakes, and a true backcountry experience.

From HTXoutdoors
